name: Usecodia
notes: Company is Codia AI, Inc. (brand name Codia). AI sales/procurement platform. Founded 2024 in San Francisco.

name: Argonenergy
notes: Site exists (title: 'AI-Powered Energy Solutions for Mission-Critical') but returns HTTP 401; minimal public web presence. Not the same as Argon AI (argon-ai.com, pharma/NYC). HQ location could not be determined.

name: Flockshop
notes: All fields already populated; echoed unchanged.

name: Airventure Partners
notes: Family-backed VC firm founded 2022, focused on early-stage consumer companies. Based in Los Angeles.

name: Keel
notes: Keel is a residential summer startup accelerator for Ivy+ founders in NYC. Site self-identifies as 'the nyc accelerator'. Categorized as Venture Capital.

name: Desk
notes: AI-powered real estate transaction coordinator. Seattle startup; 500+ agents in Seattle area. Raised $800K, lead investor Martin Tobias of Incisive Ventures. CEO Gideon Sylvan.

name: Hirepluto
notes: Voice AI recruitment platform. Registered at 80 State Street, Albany, NY (registered agent address). CEO Sahil Seth listed as New York-based on LinkedIn. Some sources (Tracxn) indicate India. Using NY as primary HQ.

name: Submix
notes: Real-time remote music collaboration platform. Founded 2019 by Paul Jeszenszky (ex-Google/Airbnb). Dual presence: Berlin and San Francisco/Bay Area. PitchBook and CBInsights list primary HQ as San Francisco. Raised $1M pre-seed June 2024.

name: Artsymail
notes: artsymail.com is the corporate email domain for Artsy (Art.sy Inc), the world's largest online art marketplace. HQ at 401 Broadway, Floor 26, New York, NY 10013.

name: Picknik
notes: PickNik Robotics — robotics software company founded 2015. HQ at 4730 Walnut Street Suite 108, Boulder, CO 80301.

name: Revelata
notes: AI platform for extracting structured data from unstructured financial documents (SEC filings, KPIs). Founded 2020, Palo Alto CA. Fintech Sandbox participant.

name: Lemon Health
notes: AI-powered personal wellness companion app. No headquarters location found in website, terms of service, or public databases. Multiple unrelated 'Lemon Health' companies in Korea, Germany, and NYC complicate identification.
